CustomField.description: Per-request hours ceiling for the discretionary Auto-approval short-circuit in DeliveryWorkApprovalService.submitForApproval. A submitted estimate at or under this many quoted hours skips the human approval queue (StatusPk__c='Auto') as long as the monthly Auto cap (DiscretionaryMonthlyCapHoursNumber__c) has not been exhausted. Blank/0 (default) disables the Auto path — every submission queues for a human approver.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Estimates at or under this many hours auto-approve (subject to the monthly cap). Blank or 0 = every estimate needs a human approval.
CustomField.label: Discretionary Threshold Hours
